_comment: ChordDiagram for open E major. IMPORTANT: the 'notes' column (pitch-class only, no octave) must NOT be used to compute MIDI. Derive MIDI from diagram_data.positions + standard tuning: string1(LowE)=40, string2(A)=45, string3(D)=50, string4(G)=55, string5(B)=59, string6(HiE)=64. Open strings use fret 0.
